creator: michael.osipov@siemens.com
text:
Port maintainer and Maven committer here. I have released Maven 3.8.8 some weeks ago.

https://maven.apache.org/docs/3.8.8/release-notes.html

Contains:
* Regression fixes from Maven 3.8.7
* General fixes
* Non-functional backports and improvements from 3.9.0

Patch is simple and tested in poudriere.
